title: AFI Provider v1 (FACTORY-CONTRACT — non-secret compute/data provider identity)
description: The canonical, non-secret identity of a compute/data provider that supplies an analytical capability for one or more of the five open analysis lanes (afi.provider.v1). A Provider record names WHO or WHAT supplies a capability — a local AFI implementation, an open-source library, an external API, a data vendor, a hosted inference service, a local model runtime, a proprietary service, or Tiny Brains. It carries ONLY minimum non-secret identity metadata: id, record version, display name, the categories it supports, execution class, deterministic posture, the identity of the trusted runtime-registered adapter that implements it, whether it requires a credential (and, if so, the KIND — never a value), an optional closed set of supported models, and an active/inactive status. Registry presence means AVAILABLE to the relevant AFI deployment or configuration — NOT universally approved by AFI Protocol.
$comment: BOUNDARY (FACTORY-CONTRACT): schema/contract only — NO adapter code, NO endpoint, NO credential storage, NO deployment. A Provider is distinct from the ingress afi.provider-strategy-binding.v1 (which routes inbound SIGNALS); this identity is the source of an ANALYTICAL capability. credentialKind names the credential CLASS only; secret values never appear here (additionalProperties:false leaves them nowhere to live). adapterId names a trusted, build-time-registered adapter in the consuming runtime (afi-reactor) — never a filesystem path or code URL.
x-afiPartOf: AFI Provider Adapter & BYOK Foundations v0.1 (PBF-GOV)
x-afiDoctrineRefs: afi-governance/decisions/provider-byok-foundations-v0.1 (PBF-GOV) D-PBF-1/D-PBF-4/D-PBF-5/D-PBF-6 — provider identity is non-secret, separate from category and implementation, backed by a trusted registered adapter, and confers no endorsement

afi-governance/decisions/factory-configurable-pipelines-v1 (FCP-GOV) D-FCP-1/D-FCP-5 — the five-category namespace; conforming providers are administrative registry updates, not per-participant governance

x-afiConstraints.noSecretMaterial: A Provider record carries only non-secret identity metadata. credentialKind names the KIND of credential a capability requires (e.g. 'apiKeyHeader') — never a value. additionalProperties:false plus explicit allowed fields leave secrets nowhere to live; the BYOK denylist (credential-ref / provider-instance validators) additionally rejects secret-named fields.
x-afiConstraints.adapterCompatibility: CROSS-FIELD (registry-tooling): adapterId MUST name a trusted, build-time-registered adapter in the consuming runtime whose category is a member of supportedCategories. Not resolvable in this contract; enforced by the runtime adapter registry (afi-reactor) and the provider-BYOK cross-reference tests.
x-afiConstraints.credentialKindPresence: credentialKind is present IFF requiresCredential is true (structurally enforced by if/then/else): a keyless provider declares no credential kind; a credentialed provider names exactly one kind.
x-afiConstraints.supportedModelsAuthority: When supportedModels is present, a provider-instance's optional model MUST be a member (cross-field, enforced by the provider-BYOK cross-reference tests). Forward-looking for aiMl; the v0.1 technical and news reference providers declare none.
x-afiConstraints.registryPresenceIsNotEndorsement: Presence of a Provider record in a registry or deployment configuration conveys no commercial endorsement and no protocol authority (D-PBF-6).

schema.description: Schema-id version of the provider identity record.

providerId.description: Stable, non-secret identifier of the provider (lowercase alphanumeric + hyphens). Referenced by afi.provider-instance.v1.providerId and afi.credential-ref.v1.providerId.

recordVersion.description: Semantic version of THIS provider record (no v prefix). Any change to the record requires a new version.

supportedCategories.description: The open analysis lanes this provider can supply (a non-empty subset of the five categories; never 'merge' or 'scorer').

executionClass.description: 'local' (in-process/first-party compute) or 'remote' (external API or hosted service).

deterministic.description: Deterministic-vs-probabilistic posture where currently meaningful (e.g. a local indicator computation is deterministic; a hosted model is probabilistic).

adapterId.description: Identity of the trusted, build-time-registered adapter that implements this provider in the consuming runtime (afi-reactor adapter registry). NEVER a filesystem path or code URL (x-afiConstraints.adapterCompatibility).

requiresCredential.description: Whether invoking this provider requires a credential (BYOK). A keyless provider is false; a credentialed provider is true and names a credentialKind.

credentialKind.description: OPTIONAL. Present IFF requiresCredential is true (x-afiConstraints.credentialKindPresence). Names the KIND of credential a capability requires — never a value. v0.1 supports 'apiKeyHeader' (an API key carried in a request header).

supportedModels.description: OPTIONAL closed set of model/algorithm identities this provider offers; when present, a provider-instance's model MUST be a member. Forward-looking for aiMl; the v0.1 reference providers declare none.

status.description: Provider record status. Only 'active' providers are selectable; 'inactive' retires without deletion.
